requirements.description: The Board must approve a documented risk appetite statement that covers model risk.
requirements.mitigation: Draft a Board risk appetite statement aligned with CPS 230. Conduct a special board meeting to approve it and record in minutes.

requirements.description: The Board must establish a documented model risk governance framework.
requirements.mitigation: Establish a formal model risk governance framework approved by the Board, defining roles, responsibilities, and escalation paths.

requirements.description: The organisation must maintain a comprehensive inventory of all models in use.
requirements.mitigation: Create and maintain a centralised model inventory listing all models, their purpose, owners, and risk classifications.

requirements.description: Models must be independently validated before deployment and at least annually thereafter.
requirements.mitigation: Implement an independent model validation process with dedicated validation team, documented methodology, and annual review schedule.

requirements.description: The organisation must have a documented data governance framework covering model inputs and outputs.
requirements.mitigation: Develop a data governance framework that covers data quality, lineage, and access controls for all model inputs and outputs.

requirements.description: Model documentation must meet standards including assumptions, limitations, and methodology.
requirements.mitigation: Create comprehensive model documentation covering assumptions, limitations, methodology, data sources, and validation results.

requirements.description: There must be a documented process for escalating model-related issues to the Board.
requirements.mitigation: Establish a formal escalation process with clear triggers, timelines, and reporting lines to the Board for model issues.

requirements.description: The risk framework must address concentration risk in model inputs and outputs.
requirements.mitigation: Conduct a concentration risk assessment identifying dependencies on single data sources, models, or methodologies.
